title: My Hope Is Built

c_lines: Music: 'Melita' John Bacchus Dykes, 1861.  Setting: "Hymns Ancient and Modern", 1869.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2011 Revision.

1.raw_text: My hope is built on nothing less Than Jesus' blood and righteousness. I dare not trust the sweetest frame, But wholly trust in Jesus' Name. On Christ the solid Rock I stand, All other ground is sinking sand.

2.raw_text: When darkness veils His lovely face, I rest on His unchanging grace. In every high and stormy gale, My anchor holds within the veil. Rock I stand, All other ground is sinking sand.

3.raw_text: His oath, His cove- nant, His blood, Support me in the whelming flood. When all around my soul gives way, He then is all my hope and stay. Rock I stand, All other ground is sinking sand.

4.raw_text: When He shall come with trumpet sound, Oh may I then in Him be found. Dressed in His righteousness alone, Faultless to stand before the throne. Rock I stand, All other ground is sinking sand.
